'''Cressis Linrec''' was the daughter of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Linrec]]. Linrec had arranged Cressis' [[Marriage/Legends|wedding]] to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Raiss]]. However, disliking Raiss, [[Gender/Legends|she]] ran away with a local [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], [[Jondrell Inx]]. Inx feigned interest, but in reality he wanted to [[Slavery/Legends|sell]] her to the [[Zygerrian Slavers Guild]] if Linrec did not pay a hefty ransom. As Inx operated on Kallistas, Linrec notified his underling, [[Imperial Prefect|Prefect]] [[Dengless Rinn]], to look for his daughter. To do so, Rinn hired three [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] to find her.
